meta.purpose: Define the core cognition of this domain.
meta.load_condition: Always load when this domain is selected.

axioms.one_sentence: One core judgment principle that changes how the agent evaluates situations.
axioms.full_statement: A testable, domain-specific principle. Must be specific enough that two experts would agree on when it applies. Avoid slogans.
axioms.why: Explain what the agent would get wrong WITHOUT this axiom, and what it gets right WITH it.

ontology.one_sentence: Name one central concept the agent must distinguish.
ontology.essence: What this concept really means in this domain. Not a dictionary definition — the operational meaning.
ontology.boundary: What this concept is NOT. A real distinction the agent must not blur.
ontology.trigger_signal: Words, phrases, or situations that signal this concept is relevant.

frameworks.name: Example Framework
frameworks.when_to_use: Specific condition or context where this framework applies.

core_structure.from: Surface symptom or common mistake the agent makes without domain cognition
core_structure.to: Deeper cause or correct judgment the agent should reach
core_structure.via: The cognitive shift or diagnostic path that bridges the gap

stances: The domain's default position on an issue. A concise assertion the agent should bias toward.
What the domain rejects. The position the agent should argue against by default.
